category_sources: Official README usage explains git absorb creates fixup commits and is used with git rebase --autosquash.
display_name_sources: Official repository and README use git-absorb.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README includes usage instructions and documentation/man-page installation notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/jrbasso/gistit; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README usage demonstrates gistit creating public/private GitHub Gists from command output or files.
source_facts.description says command-line utility for creating Gists.
